resources.string: Are you sure you want to logout?
Password must be at least 6 characters
Session expired. Please log in again.
Your account is pending admin approval. Please wait.
Close-up of the affected crop/field area
Please allow camera access to capture field photos.
Please enable GPS/Location to capture coordinates.
GPS accuracy is poor (%s m). Consider moving to open ground.
⚠️ This survey was rejected. Please review and correct the issues before resubmitting.
Submit this survey? Once submitted, it will go for QC review.

Delete this draft?

Case: %s

This cannot be undone.
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to go back?
Powered by Krishi Care & Management Services Pvt. Ltd

This account has been logged in on another device.

For security and data integrity, only one device can use an account at a time.

Contact Admin: Akshay Rai to unlock your account.
Photo from SW corner showing crop standing in plot
Stand at south-west corner of the field
Four corner pegs/stakes marking the 10m×10m or standard plot
Wide-angle photo showing the entire CCE plot in field context
Photo during harvest of the CCE plot
Harvested crop piled on threshing sheet before threshing
Total fresh biomass on calibrated weighing scale (kg)
Freshly threshed grain on weighing scale (kg)
Grain spread out for sun/shade drying
Dried grain on weighing scale — final yield weight (kg)
Moisture meter showing % moisture reading of grain sample
Photo of IC representative / Patwari / Farmer at CCE site
Farmer must be clearly visible in frame
Lay form flat, capture all 4 corners
Hold phone directly overhead, camera pointing straight down
Fill frame with a representative leaf
Stand at south boundary, face north
Stand at west boundary, face east
Stand at north boundary, face south
Stand at east boundary, face west
Photo of biomass on weighing scale
Photo of grain on weighing scale
Press \'Verify\' to verify the farmer\'s identity before starting the survey.
Enter the farmer\'s mobile number linked to insurance or bank account.
Enter the 6-digit OTP to confirm farmer\'s identity.
Guide turned off. Tap 🤖 to turn it back on.
This quick guide will explain how the app works, what\'s allowed, and how to complete your first survey correctly.\n\nRead each page carefully — it takes less than 2 minutes.

⚠️ Your account is LOCKED to the first device you log in from.

• Logging in from a second device will IMMEDIATELY log you out of the first.
• You cannot use 2 devices at the same time.
• If you change your phone, contact your Admin to unlock the account.

This protects data integrity and prevents duplicate surveys.

The app DETECTS mock location apps (GPS spoofers, fake location tools).

• If a mock location is detected, the app will CLOSE immediately.
• Surveys with fake GPS coordinates will be REJECTED.
• Using mock GPS is a violation and can lead to account suspension.

Always go to the actual survey location before starting.

The app supports 3 survey types:

🟢 CLS — Crop Loss Survey
Document crop damage, loss %, cause of event, bank details, and government officer info.

🔵 CHM — Crop Health Monitoring
Monitor crop health with up to 5 visits per case. Draw field boundary on the map.

🟠 CCE — Crop Cutting Experiment
Record grain weights, plot size, threshing data, and yield calculations.

Each survey has required and optional photos.

• Required photos MUST be captured before you can submit.
• Photos are geo-tagged automatically with GPS coordinates and timestamp.
• Use the camera in the app — do NOT import from gallery.
• Take clear, well-lit photos from the correct angle as labeled.

Photos are evidence — blurry or wrong photos will cause rejection.

Here's how a survey goes from start to finish:

1️⃣ Fill the form + take photos
2️⃣ Tap Save Draft anytime to save progress
3️⃣ When ready, tap Submit
4️⃣ Survey goes to QC review
5️⃣ Approved ✅ or Rejected ❌

If rejected, you can edit and resubmit.

You're now ready to start your first survey!
👋 Welcome! I\'m your AI Survey Guide
I\'ll walk you through completing your first survey from start to finish.\n\nYou can see 3 survey types on this screen: CLS, CHM, and CCE.
💡 Tip: CLS = Crop Loss Survey. Start with CLS if this is your first time.

Tap the CLS card to start a Crop Loss Survey.

• CLS: For documenting crop damage
• CHM: For monitoring crop health (up to 5 visits)
• CCE: For crop cutting experiments
💡 Tip: All 3 types follow the same flow — form + photos + submit.
You can verify the farmer\'s identity using their mobile number and OTP.\n\nThis is optional — tap SKIP if the farmer is not present right now.
💡 Tip: Verified surveys are processed faster and have higher approval rates.
The farmer\'s phone is confirmed. This will appear as a green banner inside the survey form.
💡 Tip: Even if skipped now, you can always verify before submitting.
Tap on the map to add at least 3 points around the field boundary. The app will calculate the field area automatically.\n\nBe at the actual field location — GPS accuracy matters!
💡 Tip: Tap DELETE to start over if you make a mistake.
The form has multiple sections — tap any section header to expand it. You must fill all required fields (marked with *).\n\nYour progress is auto-saved every 15 seconds.
💡 Tip: Tap \'Save Draft\' anytime to manually save and come back later.

Fill in:
• Year (e.g. 2025-2026)
• Season (Kharif / Rabi / Zaid)
• Scheme (PMFBY, RWBCIS, etc.)

All dropdowns are translated to your chosen language.
💡 Tip: The year auto-fills based on the current date.
Select your State → District → Tehsil → Village.\n\nEach dropdown loads based on the previous selection. Enter the Khasra number from the land records.
💡 Tip: If your village is missing, enter it manually in the Gram Panchayat field.
Select the crop type, variety, stage, and irrigation type.\n\nFor CLS: also fill Loss %, Cause of Event, and Intimation Date.
💡 Tip: Crop stage matters for verification — select the stage the crop is CURRENTLY in.
Tap the PHOTOS tab at the top. You\'ll see a list of photo slots — some are Required ✦ and some are Optional.\n\nYou must capture ALL required photos before you can submit.
💡 Tip: Photos are geo-tagged automatically. No need to add location manually.
Tap CAPTURE next to each photo slot. Hold the phone steady and ensure good lighting.\n\nFollow the label — e.g. \'Field North\', \'Nadir View\' (phone directly above crop).
💡 Tip: If a photo is blurry, tap RETAKE immediately.

Tap SAVE DRAFT at the bottom to sync your work to the server. This lets you:
• Continue later
• Switch devices (after admin unlock)
• Prevent data loss

Your draft will appear on the Dashboard under the Draft tab.
💡 Tip: The app auto-saves every 15 seconds, but manual save is more reliable on poor networks.

Everything is filled. Tap SUBMIT → to send your survey for QC review.

After submission:
• Status changes to 'Submitted'
• QC team reviews within 24-48 hours
• You'll see Approved ✅ or Rejected ❌ on the dashboard

If rejected, you can edit and resubmit. You've completed your first survey!
💡 You can always tap the 🤖 Guide button on the dashboard to re-read these tips.
The guide will stop showing. You can re-enable it from Dashboard → Guide button.
Please read carefully before using the app
I have read and agree to the Terms and Conditions
You must accept the Terms and Conditions to use this app. Declining will log you out.

By using this app, you agree that your GPS location, survey data, photographs, and device information will be collected and stored securely. This data is used solely for agricultural survey purposes and official reporting.

Your account is locked to the device you first log in from. Logging in from a second device will immediately log out the first device. Using multiple devices simultaneously is not permitted. Contact your admin if you change your phone.
Use of fake GPS or mock location apps is strictly prohibited. The app automatically detects mock location usage. Surveys submitted with fake GPS will be rejected and your account may be suspended.

All photographs must be taken using the app camera at the actual field location. Importing from gallery is not allowed. You are responsible for the accuracy of all survey data you submit. Submitting false or inaccurate data is a violation.

All survey data, farmer information, and field records are confidential. You must not share, copy, or distribute any data collected through this app. Unauthorized sharing is a serious violation and may lead to legal action.
Close-up photo of crop leaf filling the frame
Total fresh biomass on calibrated weighing scale (kg)
Dried grain on weighing scale — if moisture meter not available
Photo of the neighboring field for reference
